summary: The diff implements all five requirements (REQ-6 through REQ-10) for applying a Western Colorado rustic aesthetic to the frontend. The color palette was updated to OKLCH earthy tones, typography was enhanced with serif fonts, Layout.tsx received rustic header/footer styling, DirectoryPage.tsx got a hero section with Western Colorado messaging, and RestaurantCard.tsx was refined with rustic design elements. All requirements are implemented with evidence in the modified files.
